100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On July 10, 1926, the world observed significant events as the British Empire celebrated the centenary of the founding of the Royal Society of Arts. In the United States, a wave of heat gripped the Midwest, causing concerns over public health and agriculture. Meanwhile, tensions in Germany escalated as the government faced economic challenges, further complicating the post-war recovery.
